meta.title: Reddit Weekly Challenge - 300 Units of Ore from Eve to Gilly - Kerbal Space Program
meta.description: Recorded live on twitch.tv/everydayastronaut on 2-11-17. This week's reddit challenge was to take 300 units of Ore from Eve to Gilly. We managed to do it in 2 hours and only a few quick save reverts! Fun challenge!
